VALUES: 03 - Summary by Week (Matches Where No Umpires Are Recorded) (%seasonYear)
04 - Summary by Club (Matches Where No Umpires Are Recorded) (%seasonYear)
05 - Games with Zero Umpires For Each League (%seasonYear)

season_year.COMMENT: The year that this season belongs to.

main_name.COMMENT: The common name for a ground.

alternative_name.COMMENT: An alternative name for a ground, as there are multiple names for the same ground.

round_number.COMMENT: The round number of the season.

round_date.COMMENT: The date this round starts on.

season_id.COMMENT: The season this round belongs to.

league_id.COMMENT: The league this round belonds to.
